Question Box

Use this page as a fun, optional morale booster in Brightspace.

How to use in Brightspace

  1. Go to Content in your course
  2. Select Create New → HTML Document
  3. Open Source (</>)
  4. Copy the HTML below and paste it

Preview

Ask Your Instructor

Fill in the form below to generate an email with your question.

This will open your default email application (Outlook, Gmail, etc.) with the message already written.
